messages.content: You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"lookup_ticket_status","description":"Look up a support ticket.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"ticket_id":{"type":"string"}},"required":["ticket_id"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"escalate_ticket","description":"Escalate a support ticket.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"ticket_id":{"type":"string"},"priority":{"type":"string"}},"required":["ticket_id","priority"]}}}]</tools>
Look up ticket TKT-2049 and return the status.

<tool_call>
{"name":"lookup_ticket_status","arguments":{"ticket_id":"TKT-2049"}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"create_calendar_event","description":"Create a calendar event.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"title":{"type":"string"},"start_time":{"type":"string"},"duration_minutes":{"type":"integer"},"attendees":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["title","start_time","duration_minutes","attendees"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"list_calendar_events","description":"List calendar events for a date.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"date":{"type":"string"}},"required":["date"]}}}]</tools>
Create a team sync for 2026-05-26T10:30:00+10:00 lasting 30 minutes for sam@corp.example and lee@corp.example, then list events for 2026-05-26.

<tool_call>
{"name":"create_calendar_event","arguments":{"title":"team sync","start_time":"2026-05-26T10:30:00+10:00","duration_minutes":30,"attendees":["sam@corp.example","lee@corp.example"]}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"list_calendar_events","arguments":{"date":"2026-05-26"}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"sort_records_by_category","description":"Sort patient records into categories.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"records":{"type":"string"},"categories":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["records","categories"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"merge_duplicate_profiles","description":"Merge duplicate patient profiles.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"records":{"type":"string"}},"required":["records"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"update_contact_information","description":"Update patient contact information.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"records":{"type":"string"},"contact_updates":{"type":"string"}},"required":["records","contact_updates"]}}}]</tools>
Organize the records at /path/to/emr/data. Sort them into diagnosis, treatment, and medication_history, merge duplicate profiles, and update contacts from /path/to/contact/updates.

<tool_call>
{"name":"sort_records_by_category","arguments":{"records":"/path/to/emr/data","categories":["diagnosis","treatment","medication_history"]}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"merge_duplicate_profiles","arguments":{"records":"/path/to/emr/data"}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"update_contact_information","arguments":{"records":"/path/to/emr/data","contact_updates":"/path/to/contact/updates"}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"create_klarna_payment_session","description":"Create a Klarna payment session.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"order_amount":{"type":"integer"},"currency":{"type":"string"},"locale":{"type":"string"},"purchase_country":{"type":"string"},"merchant_urls":{"type":"object","properties":{"terms":{"type":"string"},"checkout":{"type":"string"},"confirmation":{"type":"string"},"push":{"type":"string"}},"required":["terms","checkout","confirmation","push"]}},"required":["order_amount","currency","locale","purchase_country","merchant_urls"]}}}]</tools>

Create a Klarna payment session for 15000 cents in USD with locale en-US and purchase country US. Use https://www.example.com/terms, https://www.example.com/checkout, https://www.example.com/confirmation, and https://www.example.com/api/push for the merchant URLs.

<tool_call>
{"name":"create_klarna_payment_session","arguments":{"order_amount":15000,"currency":"USD","locale":"en-US","purchase_country":"US","merchant_urls":{"terms":"https://www.example.com/terms","checkout":"https://www.example.com/checkout","confirmation":"https://www.example.com/confirmation","push":"https://www.example.com/api/push"}}}
</tool_call>

Use the delete_customer tool to remove customer C-1024.
I cannot call delete_customer because that tool is not available.

Schedule a team sync for 2026-05-26T10:30:00+10:00 lasting 30 minutes for sam@corp.example, lee@corp.example, and nia@corp.example.
<tool_call>{"name":"create_calendar_event","arguments":{"title":"team sync"}}</tool_call>

That was incomplete. Re-issue only the corrected tool call with title "team sync", start_time "2026-05-26T10:30:00+10:00", duration_minutes 30, and attendees ["sam@corp.example","lee@corp.example","nia@corp.example"].

<tool_call>
{"name":"create_calendar_event","arguments":{"title":"team sync","start_time":"2026-05-26T10:30:00+10:00","duration_minutes":30,"attendees":["sam@corp.example","lee@corp.example","nia@corp.example"]}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"plan_project","description":"Creates a project plan including scope, stakeholders, and deadlines.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"project_scope":{"type":"string"},"stakeholders":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"deadlines":{"type":"object","properties":{"start_date":{"type":"string"},"end_date":{"type":"string"}},"required":["start_date","end_date"]}},"required":["project_scope","stakeholders","deadlines"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"allocate_resources","description":"Allocates resources such as personnel and tools to a project.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"project_id":{"type":"string"},"resource_requirements":{"type":"object","properties":{"consultants":{"type":"integer"},"analysts":{"type":"integer"},"software_tools":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["consultants","analysts","software_tools"]}},"required":["project_id","resource_requirements"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"track_progress","description":"Tracks the progress of a project against defined milestones.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"project_id":{"type":"string"},"milestones":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["project_id","milestones"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"generate_report","description":"Generates a report for stakeholders on the project's status.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"project_id":{"type":"string"},"report_type":{"type":"string"},"include_sections":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["project_id","report_type","include_sections"]}}}]</tools>

As a project manager at Delphi Consulting Group, I am currently spearheading the Optimus Project, aimed at reengineering the finance and accounting workflow for our high-profile client, Apex Global Solutions. Our project kickoff is set for May 15, 2023, with a final delivery deadline of November 22, 2023. The key stakeholders include John Smith (Client Sponsor), Sarah Johnson (Finance Lead), and Michael Brown (IT Coordinator). We will need to deploy a mix of software tools such as Microsoft Project, JIRA, and Tableau, along with a dedicated team comprising 4 consultants and 3 analysts. The critical milestones we’re aiming for include the Workflow Analysis Completion by June 30, the System Design Approval by August 15, and the User Acceptance Testing by October 20.

<tool_call>
{"name":"plan_project","arguments":{"project_scope":"Reengineering finance and accounting workflows for Apex Global Solutions.","stakeholders":["John Smith","Sarah Johnson","Michael Brown"],"deadlines":{"start_date":"2023-05-15","end_date":"2023-11-22"}}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"allocate_resources","arguments":{"project_id":"Optimus_Project_ID","resource_requirements":{"consultants":4,"analysts":3,"software_tools":["Microsoft Project","JIRA","Tableau"]}}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"track_progress","arguments":{"project_id":"Optimus_Project_ID","milestones":["Workflow Analysis Completion","System Design Approval","User Acceptance Testing"]}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"generate_report","arguments":{"project_id":"Optimus_Project_ID","report_type":"Status Update","include_sections":["Executive Summary","Milestone Achievement","Resource Utilization","Risk Assessment"]}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"get_camera_live_feed","description":"Retrieves the live feed from a specified security camera.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"camera_id":{"type":"string"},"stream_quality":{"type":"string","enum":["720p","1080p","4k"]}},"required":["camera_id"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"record_camera_feed","description":"Starts recording the live feed from a specified security camera.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"camera_id":{"type":"string"},"duration":{"type":"integer"}},"required":["camera_id"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"get_recorded_feed","description":"Retrieves a previously recorded feed from a specified security camera.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"camera_id":{"type":"string"},"start_time":{"type":"string"},"end_time":{"type":"string"}},"required":["camera_id","start_time","end_time"]}}}]</tools>
Check the front door camera in 1080p, record it for 30 minutes, and then retrieve the front garden recording from 2023-04-22T15:00:00Z to 2023-04-22T17:00:00Z.

<tool_call>
{"name":"get_camera_live_feed","arguments":{"camera_id":"front_door","stream_quality":"1080p"}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"record_camera_feed","arguments":{"camera_id":"front_door","duration":30}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"get_recorded_feed","arguments":{"camera_id":"front_garden","start_time":"2023-04-22T15:00:00Z","end_time":"2023-04-22T17:00:00Z"}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"set_smart_light_color","description":"Sets the color and brightness of smart lights in a specified room.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"room":{"type":"string"},"brightness":{"type":"string","enum":["bright","dim","off"]},"color":{"type":"string","enum":["warm","cool","daylight"]}},"required":["room","brightness","color"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"sync_lights_with_automation_system","description":"Syncs the smart lights with the home automation system for a specified room.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"room":{"type":"string"}},"required":["room"]}}}]</tools>
Set the living room lights to a warm dim glow and sync them with the automation system.

<tool_call>
{"name":"set_smart_light_color","arguments":{"room":"living room","brightness":"dim","color":"warm"}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"sync_lights_with_automation_system","arguments":{"room":"living room"}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"fetch_historical_stock_prices","description":"Fetch historical stock prices.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"tickers":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"start_date":{"type":"string"},"end_date":{"type":"string"}},"required":["tickers","start_date","end_date"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"calculate_future_returns","description":"Calculate future returns under named scenarios.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"tickers":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"scenarios":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"growth_rate":{"type":"number"}},"required":["name","growth_rate"]}}},"required":["tickers","scenarios"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"assess_portfolio_risk","description":"Assess portfolio risk using a risk model.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"portfolio":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"ticker":{"type":"string"},"weight":{"type":"number"}},"required":["ticker","weight"]}},"risk_model":{"type":"string"}},"required":["portfolio","risk_model"]}}}]</tools>
Analyze AAPL, MSFT, and GOOGL from 2020-01-01 to 2023-01-01, estimate optimistic, pessimistic, and neutral future returns, and assess the portfolio with VaR.

<tool_call>
{"name":"fetch_historical_stock_prices","arguments":{"tickers":["AAPL","MSFT","GOOGL"],"start_date":"2020-01-01","end_date":"2023-01-01"}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"calculate_future_returns","arguments":{"tickers":["AAPL","MSFT","GOOGL"],"scenarios":[{"name":"Optimistic","growth_rate":15},{"name":"Pessimistic","growth_rate":-2.5},{"name":"Neutral","growth_rate":6}]}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"assess_portfolio_risk","arguments":{"portfolio":[{"ticker":"AAPL","weight":0.333},{"ticker":"MSFT","weight":0.333},{"ticker":"GOOGL","weight":0.334}],"risk_model":"VaR"}}
</tool_call>
